content.text:
Build succeeded. All 6 affected bundle files have been updated and the build output is clean.

**Summary of changes:**

`bindClickEvents()` in all 6 files now intercepts clicks on `#`-anchor CTAs:
- Calls `trackQuizEvent` as before
- Calls `e.preventDefault()` to suppress the native anchor scroll
- Uses `requestAnimationFrame()` to defer `scrollIntoView()` until after any pending reflows (Slick carousel init, lazy-image layout shifts) have settled
- Falls back gracefully if no `#` anchor (non-anchor buttons pass through unchanged)

Files updated:
- `womens-hormone-imbalance.bundle.js`
- `womens-hormone-imbalance-hero.bundle.js`
- `womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax.bundle.js`
- `womens-hormone-imbalance-tt.bundle.js`
- `womens-menopause.bundle.js`
- `womens-menopause-tt.bundle.js`

input.command:
gh pr create --title "(fix) AB#19817 - LP - Fix WOPT quiz CTA anchor scroll landing in wrong section" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Type:
🐛 Fix

## Description:
Quiz completion CTAs on WOPT pages use native anchor links (`href="#whats-included"`) with `html { scroll-behavior: smooth }`. The native scroll calculates the target position at click-time, but pending DOM reflows — Slick carousel initialization and lazy-image layout shifts in sections between the quiz and `#whats-included` — shift the target downward during the animation. The scroll ends up landing at the listicle/longform numbered steps instead of `#whats-included`.

Fix: intercept the click in `bindClickEvents()`, call `e.preventDefault()`, and defer `scrollIntoView` inside `requestAnimationFrame` so any pending reflows settle before the scroll position is calculated.

## Where can this change be found? (URLs / Location on page):
All WOPT landing pages — after completing the quiz, click the "I'm Ready To Start" CTA. Affected pages:
- `/womens-hormone-imbalance`
- `/womens-hormone-imbalance-hero`
- `/womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax`
- `/womens-hormone-imbalance-tt`
- `/womens-menopause`
- `/womens-menopause-tt`

## Images/Video (Optional):

## PR Self Checklist:

- [X] An ADO Work item is attached to the PR
- [X] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [X] I have removed any `console.log` statements
- [X] I have run yarn build and confirmed that there are no yarn/build errors
- [X] I have confirmed WP debug is not throwing any unexpected messages
- [X] I have run a merge from main and confirmed the branch is up to date
- [X] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas

## Testing Instructions:
1. On each affected WOPT page, complete the quiz and click the CTA
2. Verify the page scrolls to `#whats-included` (not an intermediate section)
3. Test at mobile viewport (≤600px) where the issue is most pronounced due to `min-height: 100vh` on `.quiz-wrapper`

## QA Considerations:
- Mobile viewport is the primary regression surface — the `min-height: 100vh` keeps the user deep in the page, making the scroll distance larger and the mid-animation reflow more impactful
- No-JS fallback is preserved: `href="#whats-included"` is still on the button

## Deployment Exceptions:

-----
_Azure DevOps work item(s) linked to the original pull request:_
- [AzureDevOps/#19817](https://dev.azure.com/Time-Therapeutics/_workitems/edit/19817)
EOF
)"
